title: erysimum nivale
intro: Erysimum nivale, also known as alpine wallflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erysimum nivale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
